news_items.headline: huggingface/transformers released Patch release: v5.5.3
news_items.summary:
New release v5.5.3 of huggingface/transformers. Small patch release to fix `device_map` support for Gemma4! It contains the following commit:

- [gemma4] Fix device map auto (#45347) by @Cyrilvallez

news_items.headline: huggingface/transformers released Patch release: v5.5.2
news_items.summary:
New release v5.5.2 of huggingface/transformers. Small patch dedicated to optimizing gemma4, fixing inference with `use_cache=False` due to k/v states sharing between layers, as well as conversion mappings for some models that would inconsistently serialize their weight names. It contains the following PRs:

- Add MoE to Gemma4 TP plan (#45219) by @sywangyi and @Cyrilvallez
- [gemma4] Dissociate kv states sharing from the Cache (#45312) by @C

news_items.headline: huggingface/transformers released Patch release v5.5.1
news_items.summary:
New release v5.5.1 of huggingface/transformers. # Patch release v5.5.1

This patch is very small and focuses on vLLM and Gemma4! 

** Fix export for gemma4 and add Integration tests (#45285) by @Cyrilvallez 
** Fix vllm cis (#45139) by @ArthurZucker

news_items.headline: ollama/ollama released v0.20.6
news_items.summary:
New release v0.20.6-rc0 of ollama/ollama. ## What's Changed
* docs: add hermes agent integration guide by @BruceMacD in https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/15488
* app/ui: re-validate image attachments when selected model changes by @matteocelani in https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/15272
* model/parsers: fix missing parallel tool call indices by @drifkin in https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/15467
* gemma4: update renderer t
